name: Chocolate Raspberry Linzer Cookies
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon and salt; set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat sugar and butter until creamy. Beat in eggs and almond extract. Gradually add flour mixture. Divide dough into two halves. Wrap each half in plastic wrap and refrigerate until firm.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F. On a lightly floured surface, roll out half of the dough to 1/8 inch thickness. Cut with 2 1/2-inch round cookie cutter. Repeat with remaining dough. Cut 1-inch round centers from half of the unbaked cookies. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
4. Reroll dough trimmings, if necessary. Bake for 8-10 minutes just until set. Let stand on cookie sheets for 2 minutes. Remove from cookie sheets and cool completely.
5. Over hot (not boiling) water, melt NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels, stirring until smooth. Spread 1 teaspoon of melted chocolate on the flat side of each whole cookie.
6. Top with 1/2 teaspoon raspberry jam. Sprinkle confectioners' sugar on cookies with center holes; place flat side down on top of chocolate-jam cookies to form cookie sandwiches.
7. Makes about 3 dozen sandwich cookies.
